name: bmd
description: BMD · Back Mes Do · monorepo (backend + web + shared)

scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:deploy: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma generate
scripts.db:reset: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.mobile:sync:ios: cd apps/mobile && npx cap sync ios
scripts.mobile:sync:android: cd apps/mobile && npx cap sync android
scripts.mobile:open:ios: cd apps/mobile && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:open:android: cd apps/mobile && npx cap open android
